title: Diagnose a runner or job execution failure
description: Separate config errors from runner/environment issues by checking tags, executor, image, and resource limits.
body: Steps: 1. Check whether the job is stuck pending (no runner matches its tags) versus failing during execution. 2. For pending, verify a runner with matching tags is online and not at concurrency limit. 3. For failures, identify the executor (docker, shell, kubernetes) and confirm the image, services, and before_script ran. 4. Distinguish code failures (reproduce locally) from environment drift (image/tool version) and resource limits (OOM, timeout). 5. Fix the root cause: add a tagged runner, pin the image, or raise limits deliberately. Rollback point: the pipeline config branch. Validation: the job is picked up and passes deterministically across reruns.
